query:
INSERT INTO posts (title, slug, body, excerpt, pillar, readTime, published, contentType, audience_type, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
('The Prophetic Tradition on Economic Justice', 'prophetic-tradition-economic-justice-2', 'The Hebrew prophets were not social activists who occasionally mentioned God. They were messengers of God who announced, with extraordinary specificity, what God thought about the social arrangements of Israel—about the treatment of the poor, the widow, the orphan, the immigrant.', 'Amos, Isaiah, Jeremiah all spoke with specificity about economic systems and the treatment of the poor.', 'Prophetic Justice', '8 min', 1, 'general', 'general', NOW(), NOW()),
('What the Jubilee Means', 'what-jubilee-means-2', 'The Jubilee was a radical economic reset. Every fifty years, land returned to its original owners and debts were forgiven. It was God''s way of preventing the permanent accumulation of wealth and power in the hands of the few.', 'A radical economic reset that returns land and forgives debts. What would jubilee look like in the American context?', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', 1, 'general', 'general', NOW(), NOW()),
('The Stranger at the Gate', 'stranger-at-gate-2', 'Immigration is not primarily a political issue but a theological one. The stranger at the gate is the specific focus of God''s justice concern throughout Scripture. The church''s response to immigration reveals its actual theology.', 'Immigration is a theological issue rooted in God''s identification with the vulnerable.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', 1, 'general', 'general', NOW(), NOW()),
('Individual Sin Is Real — But So Is Systemic Sin', 'individual-sin-systemic-sin-2', 'The Bible addresses both individual sin and systemic sin. The prophets condemned individual greed but also the systems that made greed profitable. The church that addresses only individual sin while ignoring systemic injustice has misunderstood the prophetic tradition.', 'The Bible addresses both personal morality and structural injustice.', 'Prophetic Justice', '8 min', 1, 'general', 'general', NOW(), NOW()),
('Why Poverty Is Political', 'why-poverty-political-2', 'Poverty is not primarily a result of individual failure but of systems that concentrate wealth and opportunity. The distribution of poverty along racial and economic lines reveals that it is the result of systems, not individual choices.', 'Poverty is not primarily a result of individual failure but of systems that concentrate wealth and opportunity.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', 1, 'general', 'general', NOW(), NOW()),
('The Church''s Wealth and the World''s Poverty', 'church-wealth-world-poverty-2', 'The American church is extraordinarily wealthy. The global church is largely poor. The distribution of resources between them reveals our actual priorities more clearly than any statement of theology.', 'The distribution of resources between the American church and global poverty reveals our actual priorities.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', 1, 'general', 'general', NOW(), NOW()),
('Why Payday Lending Should Keep Christians Up at Night', 'payday-lending-christians-2', 'Payday lending is a system that extracts wealth from the poor. It is incompatible with Christian ethics rooted in God''s identification with the vulnerable. The church''s silence on payday lending is a moral failure.', 'A system that extracts wealth from the poor is incompatible with Christian ethics.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', 1, 'general', 'general', NOW(), NOW()),
('The Silence About Abuse in the Church', 'silence-abuse-church-2', 'The church''s response to abuse reveals its actual priorities. The institutional protection of abusers shows that the church prioritizes its own reputation over the protection of the vulnerable.', 'Institutional protection of abusers reveals the church''s prioritization of institutional reputation over victim protection.', 'Prophetic Justice', '8 min', 1, 'general', 'general', NOW(), NOW()),
('Imago Dei Means More Than You Think', 'imago-dei-means-2', 'If every person bears God''s image, then the treatment of the poor, the imprisoned, the marginalized is treatment of God. The imago Dei is not just a theological concept but a claim about how we must treat every person.', 'If every person bears God''s image, then the treatment of the poor, the imprisoned, the marginalized is treatment of God.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', 1, 'general', 'general', NOW(), NOW()),
('What the Good Samaritan Is Actually Arguing', 'good-samaritan-actually-arguing-2', 'The parable of the Good Samaritan is not primarily about individual charity. It is about crossing boundaries—ethnic, religious, social—to care for the vulnerable. It is a parable about justice, not just kindness.', 'The parable is not primarily about individual charity but about crossing boundaries to care for the vulnerable.', 'Prophetic Justice', '8 min', 1, 'general', 'general', NOW(), NOW());
